title: carpesium nepalense var. ciliatum
intro: Carpesium nepalense var. ciliatum is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is commonly found in the Himalayan region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's extracts have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional medicine, Carpesium nepalense var. ciliatum is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams to harness its therapeutic potential.
